nutritionGoals.title: Set Nutrition & Body Goals
nutritionGoals.subtitle: Define your targets for nutrition and body composition.
nutritionGoals.targetDateSublabel: When you want to reach your body targets
nutritionGoals.settingsNote: You can change these values anytime in Settings.

results.aiDescription: Based on your body metrics and activity levels, our calculations has optimized your daily targets.
results.manualDescription: Here are the nutrition goals you set. You can continue or go back to adjust them.
results.manualTipsDescription: Start logging meals to track your progress. You can change these goals anytime in Settings.
results.projectionDescription: By tracking these goals, you are projected to reach {{value}} {{unit}} in {{days}} days.
results.projectionMaintenanceMuscleGain: With consistent training and nutrition, natural muscle gain in {{days}} days is typically {{range}} {{unit}}, depending on genetics and experience.
results.bodyFatUncertaintyNote: Range accounts for body fat measurement variation (±4%)
results.leanMassClarification: Lean mass includes water, glycogen, and other non-fat tissue—not just muscle.
results.formulasBasedOn: Based on Hall/Forbes body composition model & metabolizable energy (Int J Obes 2008; Br J Nutr 2007).
results.macroSourcesNote: Macro targets based on IOM AMDR, ISSN Position Stand (2017), ACSM/ADA/DC Joint Position Stand (2016), and Helms et al. (2014).

nutritionGoals.dynamicInfo: Daily targets are auto-calculated each day from your last 30 days of weight and nutrition data. Set your eating phase to control whether you're in a cut, maintain, or bulk.
